title: Assertion fault while renaming a table.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE x(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO x(name, value) VALUES('test', NULL);
CREATE TABLE y(ref_id INT, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES x(id));
INSERT INTO y(ref_id) VALUES((SELECT id FROM x WHERE name='test'));
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE renaming triggers assertion fault
